scripts.dev:backend: uv --cache-dir backend/.uv-cache run --project backend uvicorn --env-file .env --app-dir backend app.main:app --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @vibegraph/frontend build && pnpm --filter @hoanghieudev/vibegraph build && pnpm --filter @vibegraph/demo-frontend build && pnpm --filter @vibegraph/site build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @hoanghieudev/vibegraph typecheck && pnpm --filter @vibegraph/frontend typecheck && pnpm --filter @vibegraph/demo-frontend typecheck && pnpm --filter @vibegraph/site typecheck
scripts.test: uv --cache-dir backend/.uv-cache run --project backend pytest -c backend/pyproject.toml backend/tests && pnpm --filter @hoanghieudev/vibegraph test && pnpm --filter @vibegraph/frontend test && pnpm --filter @vibegraph/site test
scripts.check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
scripts.demo:check: uv sync --project demo/backend --locked && uv run --project demo/backend pytest -c demo/backend/pyproject.toml demo/backend/tests && pnpm --filter @vibegraph/demo-frontend build
